series_metadata.series_description: Documents the receipt of applications for and licensing of Branch Pilots by the Department. Branch pilots are licensed under the provisions of

retention_rules.disposition: Retain 5 years after pilot retirement or 40 years after license issue, whichever is greater, then transfer to the Archives, Library of Virginia for permanent retention.

schedule_metadata.agency_name: Department of Professional and Occupational Regulation

series_metadata.series_title: Application Files - Incomplete, Terminated or Rejected
series_metadata.series_description: Documents the receipt of incomplete, terminated or rejected applications for licensing of Branch Pilots by the Department. Branch pilots are licensed, under the provisions of Code of Virginia, §§ 54.1-900 through 54.1-927, to pilot oceangoing vessels within the navigable waters of Virginia.

retention_rules.disposition: Retain 5 years after the end of the calendar year of submission, then destroy in compliance with No. 8 on schedule cover page.

schedule_metadata.agency_name: Department of Professional and Occupational Regulation

series_metadata.series_description: Documents Department investigation of reported violations of law or standards of conduct by Branch Pilots.

retention_rules.disposition: Retain 5 years after pilot retirement or 40 years after license issue, whichever is greater, then transfer to the Archives, Library of Virginia for permanent retention.
